# Pull Request Checklist ✅

## Summary
- What does this PR change?

## Linked task(s)
- POC-___

## Decision log impact
- [ ] No decision changes
- [ ] Decision updated/added: ___ (docs/decision_log.md)

## Tests & evidence
- [ ] Backend tests: `uv run pytest -v`
- [ ] Backend lint: `uv run ruff check .`
- [ ] Frontend tests: `cd apps/web && npm run test`
- [ ] Frontend typecheck: `cd apps/web && npm run typecheck`
- [ ] CI green (link)

## Documentation
- [ ] Model specs updated (MOD-001/002/003) if formulas/contracts changed
- [ ] Privacy docs updated if auth/data handling changed
- [ ] Changelog updated if user-facing

## Notes / risks
- ...
